title: Simple pvp overlay
description: A simple pvp overlay that makes your game look cleaner.
body:
Simple pvp overlay is a clean, weapon-enhancement texture pack built specifically for competitive PvP. This pack focuses on improving combat visuals while keeping everything lightweight and performance-friendly.
- If you want more good packs join our discord! https://discord.gg/gXFnSNDBpK
-credits for the hearts defrosted https://modrinth.com/project/NPzwNDRa
-credits for the gui chronicaly https://modrinth.com/project/dp0LEXmz
